Version"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Upgrade Backup current database\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db\n\n# 2. Upgrade package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne\n\n# 3. Run migrations\npython -m mnemosyne.migrate --db mnemosyne.db\n\n# 4. Verify\npython -c \"from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print(m.stats())\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema Migrations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Version | Migration | Description |\n|---------|-----------|-------------|\n| 1.0 → 2.0 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_1_0_to_2_0"}]," | Add semantic memory, FTS5 indices |\n| 2.0 → 2.1 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_0_to_2_1"}]," | Add session_id to episodic |\n| 2.1 → 2.2 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_1_to_2_2"}]," | Add temporal graph indexes |"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Migrations run automatically on first connection. No manual intervention needed."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new:"}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le"],["$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18"],"$L19"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@1a"]},null,false,"$@1a"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1b",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$1c",["$L1d"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
